description: Pins the shared config_id positive-int rejection, the proto-enum purpose rejection (confirm set so both languages reach it), and the config-interface add POST body. linode_id rejection text still diverges (see report).

cases.name: rejects non-positive config_id
cases.expect_error: config_id must be a positive integer

cases.name: rejects an invalid purpose
cases.expect_error: purpose must be one of: public, vlan, vpc

cases.name: requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This adds a network interface to the configuration profile. Set confirm=true to proceed.
